arts.ttl: Union Saint-Gilloise's Kabangu loaned to Hearts
arts.sum: Elton Kabangu joins Hearts on loan from Union Saint-Gilloise for the rest of the season.

arts.ttl: Union St Gilloise send former Willem II striker on loan to Hearts
arts.sum: Union St Gilloise have announced that striker Elton Kabangu is set to join Hearts on loan for the rest of the season. The club also revealed that the Edinburgh based…

arts.ttl: Clement has to win hearts and minds at Rangers. Beating Celtic would help
arts.sum: Manager is yet to win an Old Firm match and success would help him to show he is making some progress Philippe Clement can only hope the law of averages is due to swing in his favour. If not, the sense of an elongated, unsatisfactory conclusion to his spell as the manager of Rangers will have intensified by Thursday evening. Brendan Rodgers has tasted defeat in only one of 20 Old Firm matches. Celtic’s manager has presided over 16 wins in that run. Clement would be forgiven trepidation, then, as Rangers prepare to host their oldest foes. The Belgian is yet to defeat Celtic, having faced them half a dozen times. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Ryan Stevenson in sizzling 7-pronged Hearts takedown as he gets stuck in about the club he loves
arts.sum: Hearts were a incredibly successful club the last couple of years but the reality is now they are a massively depreciating commodity

11th place hosts the side in sixth, as 10 points separate a Hearts outfit who sit second-bottom and a Motherwell team that are in the top six spots of the Scottish Premiership table. Every point is a...
